heading: Promotions; pay and allowances
label: 2124 Promotions; pay and allowances
text: An officer who is promoted under shall be entitled to the pay and allowances of the grade to which promoted from his date of rank in such grade.section 2121 of this title
notes: Amendments2018—, substituted “section 2121” for “section 271”.Pub. L. 115–282, § 123(b)(2), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282, § 112(b)section 274 of this title
